name: evidence_traceability
description: Trace evidence chains from goals through key results to source data. Verify citation integrity and identify gaps in evidence coverage.
intent: Validate and trace evidence chains for goal assertions

inputs.name: assertion_ids
inputs.description: List of assertion IDs to trace

agentInstructions: For each assertion about a goal, trace the evidence chain back to source records in Odoo or Databricks. Flag any assertion without a verifiable source. Report coverage score and gaps.
